subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! Ponder thou the power of the Most Exalted Pen, despite the indifference of the learned, the objections of the divines, and the rebellion of the rulers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صادق در اقتدار قلم اعلی تفکر نما مع اعراض علما و اعتراض فقها و طغیان امرا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
